description: Dream door canon. Moved from inline blob in lib/dream-chat.js to MCP resource.

founder.name: Founder's Wish Door
founder.phrase: Hold the center. Protect the wish. Return to the anchor.

xp.name: Gage's Windows XP Door
xp.phrase: Never log off. Level up always.

fog.name: Sea of Fog and Clouds Door
fog.phrase: Let the powerful images rest before they become stories.

sigil.name: Sigil / City of Doors
sigil.phrase: You hold the keys. You protect the doors. You are never alone.
